message.content:
@startuml
participant ShipCaptain as "ShipCaptain"
participant :System as ":System"

ShipCaptain -> :System : 1 ask the system to see how much the vessel sink
:System --> ShipCaptain : 2 ask the ship's captain to the ship data to indentify and the voyage id to know the total of containers
ShipCaptain --> :System : 3 introduces the data asked
:System --> :System : 4 get the ship and the voyage and make all calculation
:System --> ShipCaptain : 5 shows the results and informs the success of the operation

@enduml
